noise_protocol: channel-matched + independent DP draws: attack trains on an adversary noise draw, scored on an INDEPENDENT victim draw (the released surface); probes measure the victim draw. Train/test DP randomness structurally disjoint.
readout_note: recovery = token-id top-1 over the candidate pool; *_sel = recovery minus a CLEAN-rep label-shuffle floor (per layer); vcap_perplexity = reader effective token candidates 2^(H_prior_empirical - PVI), clamped [1, 2^H_prior]; probes computed on all captured rows (probe_split=all).
